message:
feat(python): numpy.vdot wrapper parity (franken_numpy-p6ij)

Add fnp_python.vdot(a, b) as a passthrough delegator to np.vdot
preserving the conjugate-of-first-arg semantics (the key asymmetry
vs np.dot for complex inputs), input flattening, and scalar return
type across real / complex / integer / n-D inputs.

Covered by one pyo3 oracle test with five scenarios: real 1-D dot,
integer 1-D exact equality, complex128 1-D (verifies first-arg
conjugation contract), explicit complex asymmetry vdot(a,b) vs
vdot(b,a), and 2-D inputs flattened by vdot — each compared via
numpy.isclose / direct integer extraction against np.vdot.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
